items.title: Bali is Cracking Down on Photographers Traveling with Tourist Visas
items.summary: Authorities are cracking down on photographers and videographers traveling in Bali on tourist visas -- even if they are not getting paid for their images. [Read More]

items.title: SKYROVER S1 and X1 Fly More Combos Add a New Touchscreen Remote with 5.5-Inch Display
items.summary: SKYROVER has refreshed its sub-249g S1 and X1 camera drone lineups with new Fly More Combo versions, swapping the basic phone-tethered controller for a dedicated remote with a built-in 5.5-inch multi-…

items.title: ACLU Sues ICE for Failing to Turn Over Records on Threats to Photographers Who Film Federal Agents
items.summary: The American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) has filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), accusing it of failing to turn over records of its practice of threatening and…

items.title: Godox LR150 Air and LC500R Air Released – Inflatable Ring and Wand Heads, One Battery Grip, 92-Minute Runtime
items.summary: Godox has launched a modular handheld lighting system built around two inflatable heads that share a single battery grip: the LR150 Air bi-color ring light and the LC500R Air RGB wand. Both deflate fl…
